caption: In an office setting, a man in a grey suit and a patterned red tie stands and speaks, gesturing with his right hand raised and index finger pointed up. He is surrounded by colleagues seated at a light-colored table. To his left, a man in a white dress shirt and grey tie listens with his hand resting on his chin. To the man's right is a woman with blonde hair tied back, wearing a brown turtleneck. As the sequence progresses, the camera pulls back to reveal more of the room, showing two additional women seated at the table; one wears a green cardigan over a white shirt. A pink mug and a white coffee cup sit on the table. The man in the suit continues to speak and gesture while the seated colleagues observe him. A framed piece of art hangs on the wall behind the group.
